name: hostel-management-system
description: Root orchestrator that runs the Spring Boot backend and Vite/React frontend together in dev mode.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run build:backend" "npm run build:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
